If show please wait, then must customers can't press any button until process completed and get response and results then after hide please wait massage customers can press another process .. so on .
All Button testing of all parts appears automatically when I press any parts without need wait response come . Test Button must is getting responses not parts,
1. JWT - Token with Expiry Time for 12hours/24hours to expiry. Disable, username & password validation with nanopay db as already user login validation available with YSYS

2. Kiosk will read the JWT from File store in kiosk instead of generating JWT for every transaction. If, any api got token expired response, Customer mode will regenerate jwt and store in file then retry the same transaction again.

r.t: Once customer receive amount, Customer mode can show transaction success screen and print receipt then process the acknowledgement (NanoPay calling again to Kiosk maintenance mode to get cassette count and updating DB and sending response to customer mode ).

si.t: 4. After customer creation, customer has to get OTP with one day expire time and customer as "WAITING FOR ACTIVATION" Status.
5. During Customer Login, YSYS has to check if the customer are "WAITING FOR ACTIVATION" return response as "WAITING FOR ACTIVATION".
6. KIOSK will ask customer to enter the OTP, New Password & Confirm Password with PIN Encryption with YSYS Key - DES.
7. Nano Pay will forward to YSYS.
8. YSYS will Decrypt the PIN and Validate. Also, Decrypt New Password and store into DB.
